summary: Phase‑flawed recording of a middling show that still delivers a nice Dark Star segment.
review: The source suffers from a serious phase problem – the two stereo channels are 180° out of sync and one side must be inverted – but otherwise is listenable. Musically the concert is viewed as uneven, with a short first set and a second set that drifts into “mellow mediocrity,” though reviewers do single out a solid Dark Star performance.

ai_rating.rationale: Show quality is judged below average by several reviewers, while the recording is usable but marred by a phase issue; combined score lands in the low‑mid range.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Channels are out of phase (180°); one side needs inversion. No other specific soundboard or audience comments.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First set described as short but well‑played; second set settles into a mellow, somewhat mediocre flow with a notable Dark Star highlight.

band_member_comments.Phil: Belch/intro (the "burp") is repeatedly attributed to Phil.
